Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant'S Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Apr-27-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Lucy Achica's Motion To Compel Defendant's Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents is moot as supplemental responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. Counsel are required to meet and confer. Counsel are advised that general objections and objections of vague and ambiguous would not be sustained. Counsel are also advised that the objections to No. 20 would not be sustained, though the meet and confer process should address some limitations to the request. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Off Calendar Jan-10-2007 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS
Off Calendar Dec-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Brian H. Chun, Esq., for Lucy Achica, Plaintiff/Moving Party
Punam Sarad, Esq., for Ronald Jay Souza, Defedant/Opposing Party

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Lucy Achica's Motion To Quash Defendant's Employment Records Subpoena is granted. The subpoenas are overly broad and seek irrelevant evidence in violation of Plaintiff' right to privacy. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
